# scalegrid_cluster_credentials (Data Source)

Fetches the root database credentials and connection strings for a cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster.
- `database` (String) Database engine: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.

### Read-Only

- `command_line` (String, Sensitive) Command-line connection syntax.
- `connection_strings` (Attributes List) Driver-specific connection strings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connection_strings))
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Root database password.
- `username` (String) Root database username.

<a id="nestedatt--connection_strings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connection_strings`

Read-Only:

- `connection_string` (String, Sensitive) Connection string.
- `driver` (String) Driver name.
